title: My First Post in Neo-Brutalism
description: Testing out Velite, MDX, and this crazy heavy-border design system.
content:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:t}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(o){const r={blockquote:"blockquote",code:"code",li:"li",p:"p",pre:"pre",ul:"ul",...o.components};return t(e,{children:[n(r.p,{children:"Welcome to the matrix."}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"This is a standard paragraph but it renders with our custom mono font. If I want to drop some knowledge, I can use a blockquote:"}),"
",t(r.blockquote,{children:["
",n(r.p,{children:'"Stay curious. Most interesting things happen outside the syllabus."'}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"Here is a list of things I need to finish:"}),"
",t(r.ul,{children:["
",n(r.li,{children:"Setup Velite"}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Write MDX"}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Deploy to Vercel"}),"
"]}),"
",t(r.p,{children:["And here is some inline code like ",n(r.code,{children:"npm run dev"}),", or a full code block:"]}),"
",n(r.pre,{children:n(r.code,{className:"language-javascript",children:'console.log("Hello Priyadharshan!");
'})})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:t}=e.components||{};return t?n(t,{...e,children:n(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};
